Raine Beteria [ Enchanter Spells ]  

Merchant
  • View
  • History
  • Media
  • Discuss
  • Tools
    • Main page
    • Print this page
    • What links here
    • Recent changes
    • Wiki search


Uploaded January 30th, 2019 by wiscookie
Updated January 31st, 2019

Category: EverQuest

Level: 50
Expansion:
NPC Added: 0000-00-00 00:00:00
NPC Last Updated: 2019-01-31 11:33:29

Goods sold (8):
Spell: Illusion: Air Elemental 5pp 2gp 4sp 9cp
Spell: Illusion: Drybone 8pp 3gp 9sp 9cp
Spell: Illusion: Earth Elemental 4pp 1gp 9sp 9cp
Spell: Illusion: Fire Elemental 6pp 2gp 9sp 9cp
Spell: Illusion: Skeleton 4pp 1gp 9sp 9cp
Spell: Illusion: Spirit Wolf 8pp 3gp 9sp 9cp
Spell: Illusion: Water Elemental 5pp 2gp 4sp 9cp
Spell: Illusion: Werewolf 10pp 4gp 9sp 9cp

Known Habitats:
  Erudin
Factions Decreased:
  Craftkeepers
Quests:
  Coin of Tash (Tashania spell)
  Incandescent Wand

Report a correction

12 posts
go down to Docks inside on right is an Erudite name begins with J-something only 1 you can casts Benevolence on do that under illusion Erudite that will take care of the faction and u can finish the quest in 5 minutes.anything is better then campin a lvl 8 for 3 hours just for a silly trade in

# Jan 11 2011 at 5:56 PM Rating: Excellent
Byren
Guru
2,467 posts
No new items, adding prices:

[Tue Jan 11 15:55:55 2011] Raine Beteria tells you, 'That'll be 5 platinum 2 gold 4 silver 9 copper per Spell: Illusion: Air Elemental.'
[Tue Jan 11 15:55:56 2011] Raine Beteria tells you, 'That'll be 8 platinum 3 gold 9 silver 9 copper per Spell: Illusion: Drybone.'
[Tue Jan 11 15:55:57 2011] Raine Beteria tells you, 'That'll be 4 platinum 1 gold 9 silver 9 copper per Spell: Illusion: Earth Elemental.'
[Tue Jan 11 15:55:58 2011] Raine Beteria tells you, 'That'll be 6 platinum 2 gold 9 silver 9 copper per Spell: Illusion: Fire Elemental.'
[Tue Jan 11 15:55:59 2011] Raine Beteria tells you, 'That'll be 4 platinum 1 gold 9 silver 9 copper per Spell: Illusion: Skeleton.'
[Tue Jan 11 15:56:00 2011] Raine Beteria tells you, 'That'll be 8 platinum 3 gold 9 silver 9 copper per Spell: Illusion: Spirit Wolf.'
[Tue Jan 11 15:56:00 2011] Raine Beteria tells you, 'That'll be 5 platinum 2 gold 4 silver 9 copper per Spell: Illusion: Water Elemental.'
[Tue Jan 11 15:56:01 2011] Raine Beteria tells you, 'That'll be 10 platinum 4 gold 9 silver 9 copper per Spell: Illusion: Werewolf.'

You can also spend about 150p as well and give Palatos Kynarn in East free port Captain drinks till your faction is maxxed out as well. It might be faster depending on how fast you can click.

Her faction is!!!!
QuoteReply
# May 18 2007 at 9:53 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592306423222
6 posts
Your faction standing with Craftkeepers got better.
▲ Page top
Quest Faction
QuoteReply
# Oct 11 2006 at 11:49 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591780668686
20 posts
Was doing the Tashania spell quest. Benevolence no longer works on this NPC. You get the generic message "Your spell did not take hold".

It is confirmed however that killing Elial Brook by the docks will increase your faction with her. With Illusion: Erudite, I started off dubious. Killed Elial Brook a bunch of times (about an hour and a half) and am now "amiable" with the illusion Erudite. Being a Drakkin, my only deity option was Veeshan.

The Faction hits on Elial Brook are:

Your faction standing with Heretics got worse.
Your faction standing with Deepwater Knights got better.
Your faction standing with Gate Callers got better.
Your faction standing with Craftkeepers got better.
Your faction standing with Crimson Hands got better.

So she has to be on one of those that improve.
▲ Page top
Her faction is!!!!!
QuoteReply
# May 18 2007 at 9:54 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592306423222
6 posts

Illusion:Erudite and Benevolence take you up to apprehensive or indifferent if you follow Inny, for all of us brave enchanters who refused to go agnostic. THATS why we're worrying about faction.

▲ Page top
Yes, CraftKeepers
QuoteReply
# Sep 27 2002 at 9:48 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591772585425
65 posts
I am an Innokurok Chanter (race doesn't really matter with chanters anymore, does it ~_^) and had a ball of a time figuring out her faction. I decided I'd try the warrens, but that didn't budge my faction at all. Then I started killing the necro at the dock in tox (his pet too, one gravity flux will kill them both) and after maybe a half an hour of camping him I went from dubvious to amiable! This was awhile ago so they may have reduced the faction you get for killing him, but thats my little 2cp for getting faction.

Edit: yes, yes, Innoruuk. =P took me 50 lvls to learn how to spell my Diety's name.

Edited, Mon May 5 15:06:09 2003
▲ Page top
RE: Yes, CraftKeepers
QuoteReply
# Jan 19 2003 at 12:32 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759395136
188 posts
Innokurok? Is that a mix between Zebuxoruk and Innoruuk? ^_^
▲ Page top
Faction
QuoteReply
# Jun 16 2002 at 5:19 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1702858594157
2 posts
I believe her to be on the Craft Keepers faction; after doing numerous wood chip returns to Emil Parsin in toxx, I still conned apprehensive even when i conned amiable to other merchants. After killing Elial Brook (the necro at the dock) in toxx, my faction began to rise. After 11 kills of the necro, I con indifferent to her. Also stated recently, when you turn the necro bones into the mage guildmaster, you do not get any Craft Keeper increases. After turning in this set of 11 bones, i still had the same con. Hope this helps.
▲ Page top
Faction
QuoteReply
# May 16 2002 at 2:42 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591776460693
8 posts
Guys, do a little reading, and maybe some research and you won't have to ask what faction. At the top of this page, it says she's a merchant. Therefore she's on the merchant faction. Researching that, you find only one quest to raise Erud merchant faction. Try being a little more observant and self-reliant and a little less helpless.

Edited, Sat May 18 22:46:16 2002
▲ Page top
RE: Faction
QuoteReply
# May 22 2002 at 1:27 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591761222747
147 posts
She is also a Quest NPC for the Incandescant Wand. (An Enchanter item) If you don't have good enough faction with her, she will tell you that you are not welcomed by the Craft Keepers. She must also be on their faction.

(The facts look so much nicer when you get them right)
